title: FNAF SB+
description: - It's a fan-made minecraft mod for the game "Five Night's At Freddy's Security Breach".
body:
This is a mod that i made in MCreator for other FNAF fans out there just like me!

It's a mod that adds neon lights, characters, a few functions, sounds and decorations from the original game. Just to warn u tho, this mod is still in beta stages, if you want to help me in any way regarding the mod, please contact me on my discord, the link is in my profile.

THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB AS SUPPORT MOD!
